# BP-105 negative: a session cookie sets both security flags.
lang: go
file: BP-105-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "net/http"

func login(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	http.SetCookie(w, &http.Cookie{
		Name:     "session_id",
		Value:    "opaque",
		Path:     "/",
		Secure:   true,
		HttpOnly: true,
	})
}
